visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Graphic animation phase: A hand holding a dark, shiny century egg appears against a solid red background. Large white characters are displayed at the top. (2) Real-life phase: A young woman with her hair tied back, wearing a white spaghetti strap top with yellow flower embellishments, bites into the century egg. She is positioned against a bright, neutral indoor background. (3) Graphic animation phase: Similar to phase 1, but with a piece of yellow pineapple cake on a hand against a solid yellow background with different white characters. (4) Real-life phase: The same woman bites into the pineapple cake piece. (5) Reaction phase: The woman is shown looking upwards with a confused expression. Stylized cartoon question marks and variety-show style text overlays appear around her. (6) Showcase phase: The woman sits on a beige sofa in a well-lit living room, surrounded by dozens of colorful potato chip bags. She holds a red bag and a yellow bag, smiling at the camera. Large yellow text overlays occupy the center of the frame. (7) Split-screen demo: Two vertical panels show the woman simultaneously eating from two different colored potato chip bags. Text labels identifying the flavors are at the bottom. (8) Closing phase: The woman gives a thumbs up while holding the yellow bag. Final promotional text and dates appear as a large overlay.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 皮蛋. (2) [Subtitle]: 鳳梨酥. (3) [Variety]: 為什麼會有洋芋片的聲音?! [Variety]: ???. [Variety]: 酥咯. [Variety]: 脆滋. (4) [Slogan]: 皮蛋跟鳳梨酥風味. [Slogan]: 洋芋片新上市!. [Slogan]: 大家趕快去試試看吧!. (5) [Subtitle]: 口味. [Subtitle]: 皮蛋. [Subtitle]: 口味. [Subtitle]: 鳳梨酥. [Logo]: 波的多. [Logo]: 水水灶咖. (6) [Slogan]: 7/3 全家門市 限定販售!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white tank top with large yellow flower patches on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Alternates between solid colored graphic backgrounds (red, yellow) and a modern indoor living room featuring a beige sofa, a full-length mirror, and decorative pillows.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A sharp, crisp percussive 'crunch' sound occurs against silence. (2) Another identical 'crunch' sound occurs. (3) A series of synthesized cartoon 'boing' and sliding whistle SFX transition into a high-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track. (4) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narration, speaking rapidly with energetic rising intonations. (5) Audible rustling of plastic snack bags overlaps with the speech. (6) More synchronized 'crunch' SFX are layered over the music beat while the female narrator continues her promotional pitch with a friendly and inviting tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Question -> Reveal -> Promotion -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a new collaborative snack product: century egg and pineapple cake flavored potato chips. The video uses sensory hooks (crunchy sounds from unexpected food items) to create curiosity, followed by an enthusiastic reveal of the actual product and availability details at FamilyMart.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, verbal endorsement, and specific sales location (FamilyMart) provided.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes synchronized SFX and fast-paced editing to create a sensory-heavy advertisement suitable for short-form social media platforms.
